name: pamsoft_grid_qt_rust_operator
description: PamSoft quantification operator. Rust port of the original MATLAB MCR implementation. Takes the melted output of the pamsoft_grid step (joined with the source images) and produces per-spot quantification stats.

properties.name: Min Diameter
properties.description: Lower bound for the segmented spot diameter, as a fraction of grdSpotPitch.

properties.name: Max Diameter
properties.description: Upper bound for the segmented spot diameter, as a fraction of grdSpotPitch.

properties.name: Saturation Limit
properties.description: Pixel intensity above which a pixel is considered saturated.

properties.name: Spot Pitch
properties.description: Distance between adjacent spots in pixels. 0 = auto-detect from image dimensions (17 for Evolve3, 21.5 for Evolve2).

properties.name: EdgeSensitivityLow
properties.description: Canny edge low threshold (fractional). The R operator hardcodes 0 here; the Rust port exposes it so it can actually be tuned.

properties.name: Spot Size
properties.description: Spot radius as a fraction of grdSpotPitch.

properties.name: Rotation
properties.description: Template rotation candidates in MATLAB seq() syntax 'min:step:max' (e.g. -2:0.25:2). A single value triggers MATLAB's imregister2 path which is known to hallucinate large rotations — use a vector for production parity.

properties.name: Diagnostic Output
properties.description: When 'No', the result table drops the diagnostic-only columns (Bad_Spot, Diameter, Empty_Spot, Fraction_Ignored, Position_Offset, Replaced_Spot, Mean_Background, Mean_SigmBg, Mean_Signal) — matching the R operator's behaviour.

metaFactors.name: Documents
metaFactors.description: documentId column(s) referencing the input file(s): the image ZIP (and optionally the array-layout text file as a second documentId). 1 or 2 columns.

metaFactors.name: Grid Reference Image
metaFactors.description: grdImageNameUsed — the chip's reference image (constant per chip across cycles/exposures). Comes from the upstream pamsoft_grid step.

metaFactors.name: Image
metaFactors.description: Image — filename stem of each individual image (one per .ci).

metaFactors.name: Grid Coordinates
metaFactors.description: spotRow and spotCol — the integer grid row/column for each spot (also from upstream pamsoft_grid).

metaFactors.name: Spot ID
metaFactors.description: ID — the spot identifier (e.g. peptide name, #REF for reference spots).

metaFactors.name: Variable
metaFactors.description: variable — the name of the gathered grid output column (gridX, gridY, diameter, grdRotation, grdXFixedPosition, grdYFixedPosition, bad, empty, manual). Produced by the upstream Gather/Melt step.
